title: Your Portfolio Is Already Outdated (Even If It Looks Perfect)
description: You spent hours polishing your portfolio. And yet… it might still be working against you. Not because it looks bad — Let’s get into it. Recruiters and clients don’t hire you for how your portfolio looks. They care about: How you think How you solve problems How you communicate your decisions If your portfolio only shows visuals and GitHub links, it’s incomplete. Instead of writing: “Built an eCommerce website using React” Explain: What problem you solved Why you chose that tech stack Challenges you faced What impact your solution created A simple structure: Problem Approach Challenges Solution Results Anyone can replicate a UI. What stands out is: Your reasoning Your decision-making How you debug and optimize Add sections like: “What I’d improve next” “What went wrong and what I learned” This builds credibility quickly. A slow portfolio is a deal-breaker. Test your site here: https://pagespeed.web.dev/ Focus on: Load speed Core Web Vitals Accessibility Simple improvement: If your po...
